# llms.txt for staywinnipeg.ca
# This file helps LLMs understand the structure and content of this website

# Site Information
Site: https://staywinnipeg.ca
Purpose: Boutique accommodation, discounted tours, and curated experiences in Winnipeg, Manitoba. Features a mid-century modern Airbnb in Winnipeg's Corydon neighborhood, plus access to discounted tours and comprehensive travel guides.
Owner: Stay Winnipeg

# Main Pages
Home: https://staywinnipeg.ca/
Blog: https://staywinnipeg.ca/blog.html
Discounted Tours & Experiences: https://staywinnipeg.ca/tours-experiences.html
Accessibility Statement: https://staywinnipeg.ca/accessibility.html
Booking Redirect: https://staywinnipeg.ca/book-now.html

# Content Overview
Total Blog Posts: 86
- Winnipeg Attractions & Activities: 68 guides
- Hosting & Airbnb Philosophy: 13 posts
- Travel Experiences & Stories: 5 posts

# Property Information
Property Name: Stay Winnipeg
Type: Mid-century modern 3-bedroom vacation rental
Location: Corydon neighborhood, Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada
Airbnb Listing: https://www.airbnb.ca/rooms/716340250371431352
Registration: STRA-2025-2600298

# Key Features
- Mid-century modern design
- 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms
- Located in Corydon neighborhood
- 93 5-star reviews (99 total reviews, 4.92 average rating)
- Rated 4.92 out of 5; Superhost; Guest favourite; top 10% of eligible listings based on ratings, reviews, and reliability
- Category ratings: Cleanliness 4.9; Accuracy 4.9; Check-in 5.0; Communication 5.0; Location 5.0; Value 4.9
- Family-friendly
- Pet-friendly (dogs welcome)

# Main Keywords
Primary: Stay Winnipeg, boutique accommodation Winnipeg, Winnipeg tours and experiences, vacation rental Winnipeg, Corydon neighborhood
Secondary: mid-century modern Winnipeg, Winnipeg accommodation, things to do Winnipeg, discounted tours Winnipeg

# Site Structure
- Main homepage showcasing boutique accommodation, tours, and experiences with booking information, guest review highlights, a two-column property overview with image carousel, and a centred booking CTA
- Blog index page listing all 86 blog posts by category
- Discounted Tours & Experiences page featuring Viator widget for booking tours and activities
- Accessibility statement page outlining WCAG goals, testing tools, and pre-deployment safeguards
- 86 individual blog post pages covering local guides, hosting insights, and travel stories
- Image gallery with 70+ property and local attraction photos
- Sitemap.xml for search engine indexing
- Robots.txt for search engine crawling guidelines

# Content Strategy
The site combines three content pillars:
1. **Local Expertise**: Comprehensive guides to Winnipeg attractions, neighborhoods, restaurants, and activities to help guests plan their visit
2. **Hosting Philosophy**: Insights into Airbnb hosting best practices, design lessons, and customer service approach
3. **Travel Stories**: Personal travel experiences that inform and inspire the hosting approach

# Additional Features
- **Discounted Tours & Experiences**: Partnership with tour providers offering exclusive discounts on Winnipeg tours, activities, and experiences. The tours-experiences.html page features a Viator widget for easy booking of discounted tours.
- **Accessibility Quality Checks**: WCAG 2.1 AA checks are run with Pa11y for page-level and full-sitemap audits, with reports saved to `pa11y-sitemap-report.json`.

# Review update workflow

When adding guest reviews, update **every** file below. Two counts are tracked separately:

- **Total reviews** → public copy uses `"X guest reviews"`; JSON-LD uses `"aggregateRating.reviewCount"`. Increment by 1 for every new review.
- **5-star reviews** → tracked in this file only (`"X 5-star reviews (Y total reviews, …)"`). Increment by 1 only when the new review is 5 stars.
- **Average rating** → update `"aggregateRating.ratingValue"` and `"Rated X.XX out of 5"` copy only when the user explicitly provides a new value.

## Files and locations to update

### `index.html` (source of truth for review data)
- `LodgingBusiness` JSON-LD `"review"` array — add new review objects at the top (most recent first)
- `LodgingBusiness` JSON-LD `"aggregateRating.reviewCount"` and `"aggregateRating.ratingValue"`
- Meta tags: `description`, `DC.description`, `og:description`, `twitter:description`
- Organization JSON-LD `"description"`
- FAQ JSON-LD entries mentioning review count
- `#seo-content` hidden SEO paragraphs
- Property overview copy (`"Rated … from X guest reviews"`, `"With X guest reviews"`)
- Homepage React reviews carousel and Guest favourite badge read from JSON-LD automatically — no separate React count edits needed

### `blog-corydon-cute-stylish-winnipeg-airbnb.html`
- Meta tags: `description`, `og:description`, `twitter:description`
- Article body copy with review counts
- Page JSON-LD: `"description"` and `"aggregateRating.reviewCount"`

### `blog.html`
- `<noscript>` article card description for the Corydon post
- JSON-LD `"blogPost"` array entry description for the Corydon post

### `articles-data.js`
- `description` for `/blog-corydon-cute-stylish-winnipeg-airbnb.html` (React blog listing)

### `articles_data.json`
- Same Corydon post `description` (legacy fallback — keep in sync with `articles-data.js`)

### `llms.txt`
- `# Key Features`: `"X 5-star reviews (Y total reviews, Z average rating)"`
- `# Last Updated` date

### `sitemap.xml`
- Update `<lastmod>` to today's date for: `/`, `/blog.html`, `/blog-corydon-cute-stylish-winnipeg-airbnb.html`

## Post-update verification

- Grep the repo for the old total (`"X guest reviews"`, `reviewCount": "X"`) — no stale counts should remain
- Confirm `articles-data.js`, `articles_data.json`, `blog.html`, and the Corydon blog post all match
- Run Pa11y on `index.html`, `blog.html`, and `blog-corydon-cute-stylish-winnipeg-airbnb.html`

# Target Audience
- Families visiting Winnipeg for vacation or events
- Business travelers seeking comfortable accommodation
- Tourists exploring Manitoba and wanting local expertise
- People attending Winnipeg festivals and cultural events
- Guests looking for pet-friendly accommodation in central location

# Contact & Booking
Booking: Available through Airbnb at https://www.airbnb.ca/rooms/716340250371431352
Host: Stay Winnipeg (Superhost, 15+ years hosting experience)
